title: planchonella keyensis
intro: Planchonella keyensis, also known as the Key West plum, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of New Caledonia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The Key West plum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions.
